_note: visualDescription (accessibility / evocative comma-phrase) for every photography project. winterblue, flipped, and palouse already carry this field in their own content-intake JSONs. surface-surveys + its 6 chapters and omani-landscapes live in data/ssot-projects.json — add each string below to those objects as a new top-level `visualDescription` field, and render it as the image alt/longdesc (and/or an on-page caption) for accessibility. Format per Lisa: short evocative words / two-word phrases, comma-separated, 6-8 max — not sentences.

visualDescription.surface-surveys: aerial abstraction, elemental surface, mineral pattern, glacial-to-volcanic range, wind-shaped texture, serial chapters, Becher-like typology
visualDescription.greenland: aerial ice, cobalt meltwater, turquoise pools, white snowfield, crevasse veining, crystalline fracture
visualDescription.white-sands: powdery gypsum, near-white, mineral mottling, soft glare, bone-pale, rippled crust
visualDescription.wahiba: golden sand, fine grain, wind-combed lines, soft ridges, warm minimalism, desert hush
visualDescription.craters: black basalt, gold lichen, rust flecks, encrusted texture, volcanic crust, mineral density
visualDescription.simpson: rust-red expanse, parallel dunes, dendritic channels, aerial rhythm, speckled grain, immense scale
visualDescription.city-of-rocks: weathered granite, chartreuse lichen, fissured stone, speckled grey, sculptural surface, sagebrush-pale
visualDescription.omani-landscapes: saturated pattern, pointillist grain, dissolved landform, pink-green-violet, graphic abstraction, form-versus-function
visualDescription.winterblue: nocturnal blue, snowbound prairie, wind-carved drifts, haloed moon, frozen minimalism, cold light, distant ranges
visualDescription.flipped: luminous icebergs, blue-white ice, near-black water, ethereal glow, stark minimalism, inverted planes
visualDescription.palouse: minimalist, monochromatic, Becher-esque typology, patterned fields, grain striations, rolling contours, spare horizon
